cases.title: Organizer Admin reviews consolidated event overview per user-flow governance step
preconditions: Published event with operational activity across registration, waitlist, check-in, and feedback domains
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin actor with organization scope to the event
steps: Invoke dashboardService.getEventDashboard(eventId) with organizer admin context
Inspect returned summary for registrations, waitlist, check-ins, feedback, and eligibility-related fields
cases.expected: Summary exposes non-negative counts for registrations, registeredSeats, waitlist, checkedIn, attended, feedbackSubmitted, and eligibility breakdown; satisfies user-flow step 'Admin reviews dashboard summary' and FR-22 consolidated operational overview

cases.title: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/dashboard returns HTTP 200 with event overview envelope
preconditions: Event in RegistrationOpen or later lifecycle state with known operational activity
OrganizerAdmin JWT with scope to the event
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/dashboard with organizer Authorization bearer token

Verify HTTP status and response body fields: eventId, capacity, registrations, registeredSeats, waitlist, checkedIn, attended, eligible, notEligible, pendingEligibility, feedbackSubmitted, feedbackRequired
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with JSON payload exposing non-negative counts or summaries for registrations, waitlist, check-ins, and feedback completion per GET /events/{eventId}/dashboard contract in API design §2.5

cases.title: Dashboard registration count matches paginated registrations list total
preconditions: Event with multiple registrations in mixed states (Registered, Waitlisted, Cancelled as applicable)
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin actor
steps: Invoke dashboardService.getEventDashboard(eventId) and read registrations field
Invoke listRegistrationsForEvent with page=1 pageSize=1 and read total from paginated envelope
Compare dashboard registrations metric to list total
cases.expected: Dashboard registrations count equals registrations list total metadata; overview is consistent with authoritative list query per FR-31 module-integration boundary

cases.title: Dashboard waitlist count matches paginated waitlist list total
preconditions: Event at capacity with waitlist enabled and at least one Waitlisted registration
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin actor
steps: Read waitlist count from dashboard summary
Invoke listWaitlistForEvent with limit=1 offset=0 and read total
Compare values
cases.expected: Dashboard waitlist metric equals waitlist list total; Organizer Admin overview accurately reflects FIFO queue size

cases.title: Dashboard check-in summary reflects checked-in and attended registration counts
preconditions: In-progress or completed event with at least one CheckedIn registration and optionally Attended after completion
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin actor
steps: Read checkedIn and attended fields from dashboard summary
Cross-reference with registrations filtered by CheckedIn and Attended states via paginated list totals
cases.expected: Dashboard checkedIn and attended counts match respective registration query totals; Organizer Admin can monitor on-site attendance progress from overview

cases.title: Dashboard exposes feedback completion summary for organizer review
preconditions: Completed or post-event event with feedback window configured
Mix of participants with and without submitted feedback
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin actor
steps: Read feedbackSubmitted and feedbackRequired fields from dashboard summary
Verify feedbackSubmitted against known feedback submission fixture state in persistence layer
cases.expected: Dashboard includes feedbackSubmitted count and feedbackRequired flag aligned with actual submission state; Organizer Admin can assess post-event feedback progress from operational overview per FR-22

cases.title: Dashboard capacity summary shows registered seats never exceeding configured capacity
preconditions: Event with configured capacity N and registrations at or near capacity
OrganizerAdmin JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/dashboard
Inspect registeredSeats and capacity fields
cases.expected: HTTP 200; registeredSeats is less than or equal to capacity at all times; capacity utilization visible in overview supports organizer monitoring without violating AC-04 invariant

cases.title: Flow A dashboard after full lifecycle reflects registration through eligibility operational totals
preconditions: E2E Flow A progressed: publish, open registration, register, check-in, complete event, submit feedback, eligibility evaluated
OrganizerAdmin JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/dashboard after lifecycle completion
Verify registration, waitlist, check-in/attendance, feedback, and eligibility summary fields
cases.expected: Overview totals align with terminal states across modules; Organizer Admin has single-call visibility into end-to-end event operations matching testing plan Flow A governance step 'Admin reviews dashboard summary'

cases.title: Organizer operations dashboard page renders KPI blocks and drill-down navigation
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin logged in with scope to an active event
Event has non-zero registrations or waitlist for meaningful KPI display
Organizer event dashboard route reachable at /organizer/events/{eventId}
steps: Navigate to organizer event operations dashboard
Observe KPI blocks for Registrations, Waitlist, Check-ins, and Eligibility or feedback indicators
Verify drill-down links to registrations, waitlist, check-in console, and eligibility pages
cases.expected: UI displays KPI summary strip and capacity meter with drill-down links to detailed operational views; dashboard does not render unbounded full participant datasets client-side per AC-14 and UI page-list operations dashboard spec

cases.title: Organizer dashboard shows loading skeleton then populated KPIs on successful fetch
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin logged in
Event dashboard route available
Network and API healthy
steps: Navigate to organizer event dashboard
Observe initial loading state
Wait for metrics and event detail queries to resolve
cases.expected: Page transitions from loading placeholder to populated dashboard with event name, state badge, capacity meter, and KPI values; failure states are not shown on successful load

cases.title: Unauthenticated GET dashboard returns 401
preconditions: Existing event with operational data
No Authorization header on request
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/dashboard without bearer token
cases.expected: HTTP 401 unauthenticated; event operational overview not exposed to anonymous callers

cases.title: Participant cannot access organizer dashboard endpoint
preconditions: Event with registrations
Participant JWT for a registration on the event
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/dashboard with participant Authorization bearer token
cases.expected: HTTP 403 forbidden; participant cannot view organizer event operational overview per roles-permissions matrix

cases.title: OrganizerAdmin outside event organization scope cannot view dashboard
preconditions: Event owned by another organization
OrganizerAdmin JWT without scope to target eventId
steps: Invoke dashboardService.getEventDashboard for out-of-scope eventId with admin context
cases.expected: HTTP 403 or 404 per event scope guard; no cross-organization operational metrics leakage

cases.title: Dashboard request for non-existent eventId returns 404
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin JWT
eventId that does not exist or is not in actor scope
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{unknownEventId}/dashboard with organizer token
cases.expected: HTTP 404 with typed error envelope containing code NOT_FOUND; no partial dashboard payload returned

cases.title: Dashboard for newly published event with zero activity returns zero counts
preconditions: Published event with no registrations, waitlist entries, check-ins, or feedback
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin actor
steps: Query dashboard summary immediately after publish with no participant activity
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with zero-valued registration, waitlist, check-in, and feedback metrics; valid empty overview rather than error

cases.title: Dashboard registration count updates after waitlist promotion when seat opens
preconditions: Full event with waitlist enabled and at least one Waitlisted participant
Registered participant cancels freeing a seat
OrganizerAdmin JWT
steps: Record dashboard registeredSeats and waitlist counts before cancellation
POST cancellation for a Registered participant triggering FIFO promotion
GET dashboard again after promotion completes
cases.expected: registeredSeats remains at or below capacity; waitlist count decreases by one when promotion succeeds; overview reflects atomic cancellation and promotion outcome per Flow B

cases.title: Dashboard aggregation derives totals from paginated list contracts without loading full datasets
preconditions: Event with total registrations, waitlist, or attendance rows exceeding default pageSize (20)
OrganizerAdmin actor
steps: Query dashboard summary
Independently fetch each underlying list endpoint with page=1 pageSize=1 to read total fields
Compare dashboard metrics to list totals
cases.expected: Dashboard totals match paginated list total metadata while using bounded page requests; overview remains accurate for large events without unbounded array responses per NFR-16 and pagination contract

cases.title: Dashboard metrics reflect new registration within near-real-time refresh window
preconditions: Active event with registration open
OrganizerAdmin actor monitoring dashboard
Fixed clock or controlled test environment for deterministic timing
steps: Capture baseline dashboard registration count
Complete a new participant registration via API
Re-query dashboard within organizer dashboard refresh interval
cases.expected: Updated registration and registeredSeats metrics visible on subsequent dashboard read; satisfies NFR-06 near-real-time organizer visibility tied to FR-22 operational overview

cases.title: Dashboard query is read-only and does not mutate event or registration state
preconditions: Event with known registration and audit state
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin actor
steps: Record registration states and latest audit log count
Invoke dashboardService.getEventDashboard multiple times in succession
Re-read registration states and audit log count
cases.expected: No registration state transitions or new audit records created by dashboard reads; query contract is side-effect free per module breakdown query conventions

cases.title: Organizer dashboard live query polling refreshes KPI values during active event window
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin logged in on event dashboard during RegistrationOpen or in-progress event
Background registration or check-in activity occurs while dashboard is open
steps: Keep organizer event dashboard page open
Trigger a registration or check-in via separate client
Observe KPI values after configured organizerDashboard polling interval elapses
cases.expected: KPI strip values update to reflect latest operational totals without requiring manual browser refresh; aligns with organizer dashboard shorter refresh interval during event-active windows

cases.title: OrganizerStaff with dashboard.view can view assigned event overview
preconditions: Event with operational activity
OrganizerStaff actor assigned to the event per scope rules
steps: Invoke dashboardService.getEventDashboard(eventId) with organizer staff context for assigned event
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with valid dashboard summary; staff operational overview access scoped per dashboard.view permission for OrganizerStaff on assigned events

cases.title: OrganizerStaff cannot view dashboard for unassigned event
preconditions: Event with operational data
OrganizerStaff JWT without assignment to target eventId
steps: Invoke dashboardService.getEventDashboard for unassigned eventId with staff context
cases.expected: HTTP 403 or 404 per event scope guard; staff cannot view operational overview outside assigned event scope

cases.title: Dashboard totals remain consistent after concurrent registrations
preconditions: Event RegistrationOpen with capacity well above concurrent request count
OrganizerAdmin actor
Multiple parallel participant registration requests
steps: Record baseline dashboard registrations and registeredSeats
Issue parallel POST /registrations from distinct participants
Re-query dashboard after all requests complete
cases.expected: Dashboard registrations and registeredSeats increment by successful registration count; registeredSeats never exceeds capacity; concurrent writes do not produce inconsistent overview totals
